message:
feat(python): numpy.cbrt wrapper parity (franken_numpy-8tj9)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.cbrt(x) — element-wise real
cube root (defined for negatives unlike sqrt). Test covers
positive/negative scalar with exact cube verification (8→2,
-27→-3), 1-D mixed-sign array, integer input promoted to float
with dtype parity, 2-D array, and a cbrt(x)**3 ≈ x round-trip
identity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
